prompt.system: You are expected to provide explanation for a robot failure. You are given the robot actions and observations so far. Briefly explain the failure in 1-2 sentence. Mention relevant time steps if possible.
prompt.user:
The robot task is to make coffee. At 00:36, a failure was identified.

[Robot actions and observations before 00:36]
00:01. Action: Move to mug. Visual observation: nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:13. Action: Move to mug. Visual observation: faucet (turned off). nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:14. Action: Move to mug. Visual observation: faucet (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside sink. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:17. Action: Pick up mug. Visual observation: faucet (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside robot gripper.
00:19. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: coffee machine (turned off), faucet (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside robot gripper.
00:21. Action: Move to sink. Visual observation: coffee machine (turned off), faucet (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside robot gripper.
00:26. Action: Put mug on sink. Visual observation: coffee machine (turned off), faucet (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside sink. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:29. Action: Toggle on faucet. Visual observation: faucet (turned on), coffee machine (turned off), mug (empty and dirty), sink. mug is inside sink. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:32. Action: Toggle off faucet. Visual observation: coffee machine (turned off), mug (filled with water and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. mug is inside sink. nothing is inside robot gripper.
00:35. Action: Pick up mug. Visual observation: coffee machine (turned off), mug (filled with water and clean), faucet (turned off), sink. mug is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:36]
Action: Pour liquid from mug into sink. Visual observation: mug (empty and clean), coffee machine (turned off), faucet (turned off), sink. mug is inside robot gripper.

Q: Infer from [Robot actions and observations before 00:36] or [Observation at the end of 00:36], briefly explain what happened at 00:36 and what caused the failure.
A:

response: At 00:36, the robot poured the water out of the mug into the sink, leaving the mug empty. This caused the coffee-making failure because at 00:32–00:35 it had just cleaned and filled the mug with water, but then discarded that water instead of using it for the coffee machine.
